features: 📅 Move to Tomorrow — Today's pending schedule items now have a → Tmrw button. Tap it to instantly reschedule any activity to the next day without deleting or re-creating it. Available in the Planner (Today tab) and the Attendance Day Report.

📄 Exam Registration Overhaul — Exam Registration entries no longer show 'Unknown Subject'. The Planner card, Day Report, and Dashboard overview widget now all correctly display the exam title, course, Notification No., and Reg No.
⚡ Crash Fixes — Fixed a crash in the schedule list and dashboard widget when sorting Exam Registration items (which have no start time). Sorting now gracefully handles null times.
📚 Day Report Improvements — Exam Registration items in the Day Report now show with a green accent (matching their card colour) and correctly display their metadata instead of a missing subject name.
📈 Performance — Removed redundant sort calls; null-safe guards added throughout schedule rendering for faster, crash-free page loads.
